changes: OpenClaw released v2026.4.11 on 2026-04-12 00:18 UTC, after a v2026.4.11-beta.1 cut on 2026-04-11 15:15 UTC.
PicoClaw posted another nightly build on 2026-04-12 00:59 UTC, while stable remains v0.2.6.
SwarmClaw shipped another release burst on 2026-04-11, most recently v1.5.35.
Hermes Agent still has no new release since v2026.4.8, and the broader atlas structure is unchanged today.
whyItMatters: OpenClaw shipping again matters most because the category anchor is still setting the pace, with a fast beta-to-stable turn.
PicoClaw's nightly cadence still reinforces the fast-moving edge and low-resource lane.
AstrBot and SwarmClaw both moving on the same cycle are useful adjacent signals that the broader messaging-native and orchestration layer is active.
Hermes remaining strategically important without a same-day release is itself informative: the learning-loop lane remains relevant even when today's motion is elsewhere.
Net: this was a material day-level update, but it does not change the stable strategic thesis yet.
